sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الرِّيَاضَةَ مُفِيدَةٌ لِلْجِسْمِ وَالنَّفْسِ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da je sport koristan za tijelo i dušu.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that sport is good for the body and the mind.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَمْشِي كُلَّ يَوْمٍ أَشْعُرُ بِطَاقَةٍ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Kada svaki dan hodam, osjećam više energije.
sentences.translationEn: When I walk every day I feel more energy.

sentences.arabic: أَنْصَحُ كُلَّ شَخْصٍ أَنْ يَمْشِيَ نِصْفَ سَاعَةٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Preporučujem svakoj osobi da hoda pola sata svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: I advise every person to walk half an hour every day.
